semanticVisualQuery: Nutrition The Foundation of Life of Nutrition

assetDebugEntries.resolvedAltText: A simple diagram comparing an animal cell and plant leaf cell, labelled in English. It shows the cytoplasm, nucleus, cell membrane, cell wall, mitochondria, permanent vacuole, and chloroplasts. Items marked in green are specific to plant cells. Due to rendering issues, text has been converted to paths, check bottom layer for editable text. (Font is Zona Pro). This should really be changed to fit in with the new style, it is somewhere on my to-do list but please tell me if you're doing it ;) Cytoplasm Nucleus Cell membrane Mitochondrion Cell wall Permanent vacuole Chloroplast
